pos_sentences: From 7th sem students are eligible for placement there is the opportunity of placement in our college the package was good above 3 lakhs per year and the companies like infotech seat are have tie up with our college.
The faculty of first year was good and the their teaching experience was also nice
I got into the post matric scholarship scheme in the maharashtra govt i completed an internship at fountech ltd it was a very good internship i was the very best guide in company.
The library environment is so peaceful, neat, and clean, and there sitting arrangement for students is also good.
Here, the admission process is better with the best counselor.
Help in different platform. a great curricular activities in my college
They're an excellent way to get college credit for the experience.

Yes, l took cet entrance exam for admission there will be reservation benefits available in our college our college admission process is very good on the college site the information is available for admission.
Hostels thus serve as fit platforms for bringing together children from different backgrounds and giving them an opportunity to interact with each other and learn about cultures other than their own.
neg_sentences: I am not satisfies with the average placement of my college.
I got the opportunity to work at a pune-based company but my college didn't support me with my internship documents and my hod was very angry that i was doing that.
I found many people frustrated with this problem there is no other way to express yourself and it is disappointing to all the ug students.
No placement are here there are no way to explore yourself.
See there are so many methods to express yourself but the main thing is we can't focus on our studies due to paying the college fee i also belong to a poor family.
